calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Prove Up Hearing For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge: Harry L Jacobs; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:16 am and concluding at 9:22 am.

Plaintiff Ayda Kefyalew appearing represented by Kelechi Emeziem, Esq. is placed under oath and testifies via zoom video conference.
Defendant Nina Colon not appearing.

Plaintiff's counsel presents offer of proof and a summary of the facts as set forth on the record.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Ayda Kefyalew and against Defendant Nina Colon as follows:

Damages: $36,274.30
Pain and Suffering: $150,000.00
Costs: $440.00

Total Judgment $186,714.30
Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
